---
title: "The Rev. Samuel John Stone"
---

## The Rev. Samuel John Stone

**Dates:** (1839-1900)

### Description

Vicar of St. Paul’s, Haggerston, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865-84)

### Biography

He was vicar from 1874 of St Paul’s, Haggerston, and author of the famous Tractarian hymn 'The Church's One Foundation'. [<i>Clergy List</i> 1887; ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 28th 1885
- Letter from Feb 21st 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
